positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for positive
% SZS output start Proof for positive
1. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) => organic_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (alkane(X0) => hydrocarbon(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) => chemical_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) => ~contains_only_one_element(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. (chemical_compound(m) & contains_only_one_element(m)) | (~chemical_compound(m) & ~contains_only_one_element(m)) [input(axiom)]
7. (contains_only_one_element(m) | contains_carbon(m)) => (~chemical_compound(m) & ~alkane(m)) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~((contains_only_one_element(m) | contains_carbon(m)) => (~chemical_compound(m) & ~alkane(m))) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~(~chemical_compound(m) & ~alkane(m)) [pure predicate removal 8]
11. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) | ~hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
12. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) | ~alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | ~organic_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
14. ! [X0] : (~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
15. chemical_compound(m) | alkane(m) [ennf transformation 9]
16. ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
17. ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
18. ~organic_compound(X0) | chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
19. ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
21. contains_only_one_element(m) | ~chemical_compound(m) [cnf transformation 6]
24. chemical_compound(m) | alkane(m) [cnf transformation 15]
26. 1 <=> alkane(m) [avatar definition]
28. alkane(m) <- (1) [avatar component clause 26]
30. 2 <=> chemical_compound(m) [avatar definition]
31. ~chemical_compound(m) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 30]
32. chemical_compound(m) <- (2) [avatar component clause 30]
33. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 24,30,26]
35. 3 <=> contains_only_one_element(m) [avatar definition]
37. contains_only_one_element(m) <- (3) [avatar component clause 35]
38. ~2 | 3 [avatar split clause 21,35,30]
40. ~chemical_compound(m) <- (3) [resolution 19,37]
41. $false <- (2, 3) [forward subsumption resolution 40,32]
42. ~2 | ~3 [avatar contradiction clause 41]
43. hydrocarbon(m) <- (1) [resolution 28,17]
44. organic_compound(m) <- (1) [resolution 43,16]
45. chemical_compound(m) <- (1) [resolution 44,18]
46. $false <- (1, ~2) [forward subsumption resolution 45,31]
47. ~1 | 2 [avatar contradiction clause 46]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 33]
s2. ~2 | 3 [sat_conversion 38]
s4. ~3 | ~2 [sat_conversion 42]
s5. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 47]
s6. ~2 [rat s2,s4]
s7. ~1 [rat s5,s6]
s9. # [rat s1,s6,s7]
48. $false [avatar sat refutation s9]
% SZS output end Proof for positive
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    ~chemical_compound(m)).

cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    ~contains_only_one_element(m)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
